title: Cosmere Overhaul
description: This Resource Pack overhauls the textures of leafyreynold's Cosmere mods.
body:
The Cosmere Project is a group of mods developed by [leafyreynolds](https://modrinth.com/user/leafreynolds). The mods each add special element's from Brandon Sanderson's [Cosmere](https://coppermind.net/wiki/Coppermind:Welcome) universe. I, however, found the textures somewhat lackluster. And so I made this resource pack to make it a bit more immersive.![All the metals!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27e997c33c14c560a8cd0a8129e87154dd7cb832.png)

If you're like me and visual appeal is a must for a good time, then play The Cosmere Project mods with this resource pack.

**Note: you will need to disable item tinting for this resource pack to look right.** you can do that by going to your modpack's folder -> config -> cosmere -> CosmereClient.toml.

## Download the Cosmere Suite here:

[Cosmere](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmere)

[Allomancy](https://modrinth.com/mod/allomancer)

[Feruchemy](https://modrinth.com/mod/feruchemy)

[Hemalurgy](https://modrinth.com/mod/hemalurgy)
